# ceph_fs (Resource)

Manages a CephFS filesystem. The metadata and data pools must already exist before creating the filesystem.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ceph_osd_pool" "cephfs_metadata" {
  name        = "cephfs_metadata"
  size        = 3
  application = ["cephfs"]
}

resource "ceph_osd_pool" "cephfs_data" {
  name        = "cephfs_data"
  size        = 3
  application = ["cephfs"]
}

resource "ceph_fs" "cephfs" {
  name          = "cephfs"
  metadata_pool = ceph_osd_pool.cephfs_metadata.name
  data_pools    = [ceph_osd_pool.cephfs_data.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data_pools` (Set of String) Data pools for the filesystem. At least one is required.
- `metadata_pool` (String) Pool used for filesystem metadata. Changing this forces recreation of the filesystem.
- `name` (String) The name of the filesystem.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
